title: swarm-do telemetry run record
description: One row appended to runs.jsonl per swarm-run invocation. v1 frozen 2026-04-23. schema_ok is writer-attested in Phase 9a; validator-confirmed in Phase 10a.

timestamp_start.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when swarm-run was invoked

timestamp_end.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when swarm-run EXIT trap fired

model.description: Model identifier used for the run (e.g. opus, sonnet, gpt-5.4)

effort.description: Reasoning effort level passed to the backend

prompt_bundle_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of shared.md + <backend>.md concatenation for the role. null if bundle files missing.

config_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the active swarm config (backends.toml or equivalent). null in Phase 9a.

role.description: Swarm role executed in this run

phase_kind.description: Phase kind tag from the issue (e.g. feature, bug, refactor). null if not available.

phase_complexity.description: Phase complexity tag from the issue (e.g. simple, moderate, complex). null if not available.

risk_tags.description: Risk tags from the issue. null if not available.

repo.description: Git remote origin URL or slug of the repo being worked on. null if not determinable.

base_sha.description: Git HEAD SHA at the start of the run. null if not determinable.

head_sha.description: Git HEAD SHA at the end of the run (after any commits). null if not determinable.

diff_size_bytes.description: Byte count of git diff from base_sha to head_sha. null if not determinable.

tokens.description: Total tokens consumed (input + output). null: not observable from swarm-run in Phase 9a.

cost.description: Estimated cost in USD. null: not observable from swarm-run in Phase 9a.

wall_clock_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds from start to EXIT trap. null if timing fails.

tool_call_count.description: Number of tool calls made by the backend. null: not observable from swarm-run in Phase 9a.

cap_hit.description: True if a rate-limit or cap was hit during the run. null: not observable in Phase 9a.

schema_ok.description: True = writer attests the row conforms to this schema. Phase 10a swarm-validate will overwrite with validator-confirmed value.

exit_code.description: Exit code of the backend invocation (BACKEND_RC). 0 = success.
